summary: Completed Portuguese accent verification testing for MEDVET INTEGRATIVA. All 13 pages load correctly with properly accented Portuguese text. Fixed routing bug where /missão (with accent) was not matching /missao route. Backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) return properly accented category names like 'Homeopatia Veterinária' and 'Hormônios Bioidênticos'.

minor.issue: Returns 401 for unauthenticated users - expected behavior, not a bug

fixed_issues.issue: Mission page link used /missão (with accent) but route is /missao (without accent)
fixed_issues.fix: Changed href from '/missão' to '/missao' in all navigation links

passed_tests: Homepage loads with 'Nossa Missão' in nav (with accent)
Homepage shows 'Medicina Veterinária Integrativa' badge (with accent)
Products page (/produtos) loads with 'Homeopatia Veterinária' category
Products page shows 'Hormônios Bioidênticos' category (with accents)
Team page (/equipe) loads with Dra. Tabatha bio
Mission page (/missao) loads with accented text
GET /api/products returns products with accented descriptions
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing seed data already has proper Portuguese accents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portuguese accent corrections verified across all 23 frontend files and backend server.py. Mission page routing bug was fixed (changed /missão to /missao in navigation links). All pages display accented Portuguese text correctly: Missão, Veterinária, Hormônios, Bioidênticos, saúde, etc. Backend APIs return properly accented data.
